allow: Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/lib/data.js', 'utf8'\); // Find all quoted keys before :{ const re = /\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\":\\s*\\{/g; let m, names=new Set\(\); while\(\(m=re.exec\(src\)\)!==null\) { if\(m[1].length > 1 && !['g','f','df','mf','fw','ovr','p'].includes\(m[1]\)\) names.add\(m[1]\); } const arr = Array.from\(names\); console.log\('Keys:', arr.length\); console.log\(arr.join\('\\n'\)\); ")
